zh.lifeSummary: 當Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne於大約1063年出生在法國布列塔尼分尼斯艾a奧藍時，他的父親Hoël de Cornouaille Comte de Kernev Duke de Bretagne42歲，母親Hawise de Bretagne Duchess of Brittany37歲。他於大約1086年與Constance de Normandie在法國卡爾瓦多斯凱結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他於1098年登記服兵役。他去世於1119年10月13日在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉雷頓享年57歲，埋葬在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne于大约1063年出生在法国布列塔尼分尼斯艾a奧藍时，他的父亲Hoël de Cornouaille Comte de Kernev Duke de Bretagne42岁，母亲Hawise de Bretagne Duchess of Brittany37岁。他于大约1086年与Constance de Normandie在法国卡爾瓦多斯凱结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他于1098年登记服兵役。他去世于1119年10月13日在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉雷頓享年57岁，埋葬在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Alain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Breton form of Alan, now common in all parts of France. See Alan .

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne was born about 1063, in Châteaulin, Finistère, Brittany, France, his father, Hoël de Cornouaille Comte de Kernev Duke de Bretagne, was 42 and his mother, Hawise de Bretagne Duchess of Brittany, was 37. He married Constance de Normandie about 1086, in Caen, Calvados, France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1098. He died on 13 October 1119, in Redon, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, at the age of 57, and was buried in Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France.

fr.Bretagne, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, Fr: Bretagne, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, France
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne est né environ 1063, à Châteaulin, Finistère, Bretagne, France, son père, Hoël de Cornouaille Comte de Kernev Duke de Bretagne, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Hawise de Bretagne Duchess of Brittany, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Constance de Normandie environ 1086, à Caen, Calvados, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1098. Il est décédé le 13 octobre 1119, à Redon, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France.

de.Bretagne, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, Fr: Bretagne, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne um 1063 in Châteaulin, Finistère, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hoël de Cornouaille Comte de Kernev Duke de Bretagne 42 und seine Mutter Hawise de Bretagne Duchess of Brittany 37. Er hat um 1086 in Caen, Calvados, Frankreich Constance de Normandie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1098 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 13. Oktober 1119 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Redon, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne è nato il circa 1063 nel Châteaulin, Finistère, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Hoël de Cornouaille Comte de Kernev Duke de Bretagne, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Hawise de Bretagne Duchess of Brittany, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Constance de Normandie circa 1086, nel Caen, Calvados, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1098. Morì il 13 ottobre 1119, nel Redon, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagneが約1063年にフランスブレタグンフィニストeアチaテアウリンで生まれた時，父Hoël de Cornouaille Comte de Kernev Duke de Bretagneは42歳，母Hawise de Bretagne Duchess of Brittanyは37歳であった。約1086年にフランスカルヴァドスケンでConstance de Normandieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1098年に兵役登録をした。彼は1119年10月13日にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインレドンで57歳で死去し，フランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインにて埋葬された。

ko.Bretagne, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, Fr: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 인드르 브레타그니
ko.lifeSummary: Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne(이)가 대략 1063년 프랑스 브레타그니 핑니스트e르 cha테오린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hoël de Cornouaille Comte de Kernev Duke de Bretagne(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise de Bretagne Duchess of Brittany(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1086년 프랑스 캘바도스 카이에서 Constance de Normandie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1098년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1119년 10월 13일 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 레던에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인에 묻혔다.

pt.Bretagne, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, Fr: Bretagne, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne nasceu aproximadamente 1063, em Châteaulin, Finistère, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Hoël de Cornouaille Comte de Kernev Duke de Bretagne, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Hawise de Bretagne Duchess of Brittany, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Constance de Normandie aproximadamente 1086, em Caen, Calvados, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1098. Ele faleceu em 13 de outubro de 1119, em Redon, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França.

ru.Bretagne, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, Fr: бретагн, индр, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne родился около 1063 г. в местности чaтолинь, финистeр, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Hoël de Cornouaille Comte de Kernev Duke de Bretagne было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Hawise de Bretagne Duchess of Brittany, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Constance de Normandie около 1086 г. в местности каен, калвадос, Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. В 1098 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 13 октября 1119 г. в местности редон, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne nació aproximadamente 1063, en Châteaulin, Finistère, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Hoël de Cornouaille Comte de Kernev Duke de Bretagne, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Hawise de Bretagne Duchess of Brittany, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Constance de Normandie aproximadamente 1086, en Caen, Calvados, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1098. Murió el 13 de octubre de 1119, en Redon, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia.
